item.title: FuRyu trademarks CRYMELIGHT in Japan
item.content:encoded:
The next CRY game following CRYSTAR and CRYMACHINA?

FuRyu filed a trademark for “CRYMELIGHT” on March 27 in Japan, which was made public on April 6.

The naming scheme follows previous FuRyu-published games CRYSTAR and CRYMACHINA.

The Tokyo-based publisher tends to announce its major game release for the year between February and May. VARLET was announced in April 2025, REYNATIS in February 2024, CRYMACHINA in February 2023, and Trinity Trigger in May 2022.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/furyu-trademarks-crymelight-in-japan
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
